<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is a Node.js Express backend for user authentication and PostgreSQL integration. Use REST API endpoints for login, registration, and user data. Use bcryptjs for password hashing and pg for PostgreSQL connection. All business logic should be implemented in the backend, not the frontend.
